{{Quote|And here I thought… Anzati… were ''silent'' killers.|[[Oppo Rancisis/Legends|Oppo Rancisis]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Republic: Siege of Saleucami">''[[Star Wars: Republic: Siege of Saleucami]]''</ref>}}
'''Rath Kelkko''' was an [[Anzat (species)|Anzati]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] who was recruited to train and lead the uprising army on [[Saleucami/Legends|Saleucami]] of [[Morgukai]]. [[Sora Bulq/Legends|Sora Bulq]] hired him and his fellow Anzati assassins to train a "[[Morgukai Shadow Army|shadow army]]" for the purposes and wills of [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]]. His final hour was to be used to assassinate [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Oppo Rancisis/Legends|Oppo Rancisis]]. When he was the last assassin of his team he charged the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] in a vain attempt. He was [[Telekinesis/Legends#Force Push|Force pushed]] into an energy barrier, thus causing his death. His attack was merely a distraction for Sora Bulq, who then [[Shiak|stabbed]] Rancisis.
